caption: Only 90 days until summerrr in NYC! Can’t wait for rooftop season 😍🥰 Want the best rooftops and hidden gems in NYC? Shop my 7 Day NYC Itinerary (link in bio) 🗽 It’s not just a list of places…each day is mapped out with 4 aesthetic spots, organized by location so you’re not zigzagging across the city. I even included walk and drive times so all the planning is done for you. #travelbucketlist #nyc #nycrooftopseason #nycrooftop #nycitinerary
